titleStmt.title: SII 27.366: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 366. (A.R. No. 329 of 1931-32.) SURĀLA, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 4) set up in the inner prākāra of the Mahāliṅgēśvara temple.

The record registers a gift of land by Īśvara-sāvanta, younger brother of Kōṭīsara-sāvanta for feeding brāhmaṇas in the satra attached to the Mahādēva temple at Surāla, during the time of Ñāgañcha Toḷaha when his younger brother Bemmaṇṇañcha was enjoying the kumāra-vṛitti. It mentions Neṇagunda-30.
It is dated Śaka 137[4], Āṅgīrasa, Chaitra śu. 1, Wednesday corresponding to 1452 A.D., March 22.
1. This is engraved in continuation of the above as a supplement.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayēṁ nama[ḥ .*] namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē
trayilōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī ja
yābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1374 saṁduvartamāna Āṁgirasa saṁva
tsarada cayitra śu 1 saumyavāradalu śrīmatu sakalaguṇa saṁpaṁna
rappa nāgaṁcatoḷahara kāladali Avarataṁma beṁmaṁṇaṁcaru kumāra vṛ
ttiya naḍavakāladali yeraḍūru nālkumaneya baṁdhugaḷu neṇa
guṁḍimuvatunulā bāḷumuṁtāgi bāḷiya baṁdu kōṭēsara sā
vaṁtana taṁma yisara sāvaṁtanu sūrālamahadēva
ra saṁnidhiyalu māḍida dharṁma dinaṁprati ja 12 brāhmaṇa bhōjana
naḍavaṁtāgi tsatrakke bāḷanū dhāreyaneṟadu barasida śilāśāsana
da kramaveṁteṁdare muṁdāḍiya Oḷagemāda tanakai
yali mūlavakoṁḍa bāḷu guḷiya gadeya paḍuva Oḍiya catusīme
ya vivara mūḍalu nāraṇa kithilana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu ga
daṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu dēvarāḷuvana dharmmadagadeyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu
baḍagalu nāraṇakithilana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catusī
meyiṁda Oḷaguḷa bayalu bituva bede gaṇagilu 50 hāne bittuva
bayalu mattaṁ kayipatiya haḷiya catusīmeya vivara mū
ḍalu dēvarāḷuvana dharmmada gadeyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalū
teṁkalu sāliṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu sāliṁ mūḍalu
baḍagalu sāliṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīmeyiṁda Oḷagu
ḷa bayalu bituva bede gaṇagilu Þ hāne bittuva bayalu mara
haḷiya Oḷage kaṁdaraṇi jatanakaiya mūlavakoṁḍa makkiya catusī
meya vivara baḍagalu saṁkara kaṇajatana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu pa
ḍuvalu Uṁṇiyaṇa kithilana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu teṁkalu
Uṁṇuṁṇa kithilana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu mūḍalu koṭharana
gaḍiyiṁda paḍuvalu yiṁtī catusīmeyiṁda Oḷaguḷa bā
ḷu bittuva bedegaṇagilu nāghaṁḍugadalu mū 30 Aṁttu baya
lu kasahita yoṁdu mane bittuva bāḷu yi nālku catusīme yo
ḷagaḷa makkimaranekkiniḍilu sahavāgi yi bāḷiṁdaṁ mahā
dēvara saṁnidhiyali naḍava brāhmaṇa bhōjana neyali nā
ghaṁḍu gadalu naḍava Akkimuḍe 10 yi bāḷanu māraṁṇa
javanamaga rāmakaṇaṁjataṟa nāyaru mūla nā
mahādēva naḍava dha
bāḷuvanu yī Akkiyanū
Akki Uḷidare hā nāyaru mūlava
ya bāḷiṁda teṟu Osage Anayaka
yese biḍara Avadu yilla sarvamāṁnya
ke toḷaharū beṁma
śrī mahādēvarū
muṁdāḍiya ra Oppa
haḷiya
pālanayōrmmadhyē dānāśrēyōnupālanaṁ dā
nātsarggamavāpnōti pālanādaccutaṁ padaṁ
Digital edition of SII 27.366 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
